diagnosis.signs: 🚨 Your hair is crying for help:
diagnosis.goodNews: 🌱 The good news? There's a solution.
diagnosis.goodNewsText: Your hair can recover much faster than you think. All you need are the right recipes, with ingredients you already have at home, with results that show up on the first application.

chemHeavy.sign: Strand structure weakened by chemical overload
chemHeavy.cause: Strong chemicals break down the hair's proteins with continued use

chemMild.sign: Dependency on products for temporary results
chemMild.cause: Conventional creams mask the problem without treating the root cause

waterHot.cause: Hot water opens the cuticle and deeply dries out every strand

heatTools.cause: Frequent heat without protection weakens and damages the strand

noHydration.cause: Irregular moisturizing doesn't replenish the nutrients strands lose every day

washDaily.sign: Excessive removal of natural protective oils
washDaily.cause: Daily washing eliminates the natural barrier that protects and hydrates strands

default.sign: Routine partially correct, but with hidden gaps
default.cause: Small adjustments in technique can unlock much greater results

items.q: What if I don't like it?
items.a: Cancel anytime, directly through the customer portal. No questions, no hassle, no fees. You have full control of your subscription. One click and you're done.
No! The recipes use simple ingredients like honey, aloe vera, coconut oil and others you probably already have at home right now. The average cost per recipe is less than $0.50.

items.q: How long until I see results?
items.a: Many people notice a difference on the very first recipe application. For complete transformation results, most see it in 2 to 3 weeks following the routine.

items.q: Does it work for any hair type?
items.a: Yes! Your plan was built based on your diagnosis answers, so the recipes and routine are specific to your hair type and main problem.

hairDiagnosis.planReadySubtitle: We identified what may be damaging your hair

causes.daily: daily habits that damage the strand over time
causes.hydration: lack of regular hydration and nutrition

planItems: Complete hair routine for recovery and hydration
Natural recipe library with simple ingredients
Progress and achievements throughout the journey
hairDiagnosis.day1Task: Switch hot water for warm or cold
hairDiagnosis.startSubtitle: 21-day plan with natural recipes, complete routine and progress tracking.

hairDashboard.title: Hair Routine ✨
hairDashboard.subtitle: Structured plan to restore strand health, control frizz and prevent breakage with natural ingredients.
hairDashboard.essentialSubtitle: For best results, focus on these 3 recipes. They are the foundation of hair recovery.
dailyHabits: Use warm or cold water to wash your hair
Protect your hair with heat protectant before using heat tools
Sleep with a satin or silk pillowcase to reduce friction
Stay well hydrated — hair reflects your body's internal health
Brush carefully, always from bottom to top, without pulling
Avoid tying wet hair — it causes breakage
habitsToAvoid: Hot water in the shower — dries out strands and opens the cuticle
Daily use of hair dryer or flat iron without heat protection
Brushing wet hair forcefully — that's when it's weakest
Excess chemical products without compensatory moisturizing
Tying too tightly with rubber bands

babosa-mel.shortDesc: Deep hydration, shine and cuticle sealing

tratamento-noturno-oleo.shortDesc: Deep overnight nutrition and strand strengthening

maizena-acucar.shortDesc: Intense softness, shine and cuticle sealing

specialRecipe.name: Scalp tonic with apple cider vinegar
specialRecipe.description: Balances pH, removes product buildup and stimulates circulation for healthier growth.
ingredients: 2 tablespoons of organic apple cider vinegar
specialRecipe.instructions: Mix vinegar in water. After washing hair, apply to scalp with gentle massage. Leave for 2 minutes and rinse.

hairRecipes.title: Natural Recipes
hairRecipes.subtitle: Curated library of {{count}} recipes · Select ingredients to filter
hairRecipes.essentialSubtitle: If you only do these recipes, you'll already see a real difference in your hair.
hairRecipes.empty: No recipe with these combined ingredients.

hairPlan.title: Hair Plan
hairPlan.subtitle: 4-phase journey · 3 weeks each
hairPlan.reminderText: You don't have to do everything. Choose 1 recipe per week and maintain the habits. Simple consistency creates real results.
hairPlan.restartConfirmText: Your progress will be erased and you'll go back to Phase 1.

1.name: Recovery
1.focus: Deeply hydrate and repair existing damage
1.description: The first step is to restore what was lost. We'll hydrate, seal cuticles and build habits that stop damage.

1.desc: The first step is restoring lost moisture. Do at least 1 recipe this week.
habits: Use warm or cold water to wash your hair
Stay well hydrated — hair reflects the body's internal health

2.desc: Keep the hydration going and start building new habits consistently.
habits: Finish the shower with 30 seconds of cold water
Avoid the hair dryer — let it air dry when possible

3.desc: Seal the results achieved and prepare for the strengthening phase.
habits: Keep the habits from previous weeks
Notice the difference in shine and softness
Avoid heat tools and metal hair ties
Take a photo to compare to the start 📸

2.name: Strengthening
2.focus: Reduce breakage and improve strand structure
2.description: With hydration restored, it's time to strengthen the hair fiber and systematically reduce breakage.

1.desc: Start adding protein to your routine to rebuild damaged strands.
habits: Keep using warm or cold water

2.desc: Balance protein and hydration for healthy, strong strands.
habits: Sleep with a loose braid to reduce overnight breakage
Apply coconut oil to ends before sleeping
Avoid flat iron or hair dryer this week

3.desc: Finish the phase with stronger, more resilient strands.

3.name: Growth
3.focus: Stimulate healthy growth and reduce hair loss
3.description: A healthy scalp grows more. In this phase we focus on root nutrition and follicle stimulation.

1.desc: Start stimulating the scalp with targeted treatments.
habits: Massage your scalp for 5 min before sleeping
Eat well — vitamins make a difference

2.desc: Apply anti-shedding tonics regularly for consistent results.
habits: Use cold water at the end of the shower

3.desc: Consolidate growth results and prepare for the maintenance phase.
habits: Massage scalp with fingertips for 5 min

4.name: Maintenance
4.focus: Maintain results and prevent new damage
4.description: You've reached the ideal state. Now maintain with consistency and keep evolving month by month.

1.desc: Keep up the habits and recipes that gave you results.
habits: Apply pure aloe vera as a light conditioner
Keep cold water at the end of the shower
Coconut oil on ends before sleeping

2.desc: Review your progress and adjust the routine as needed.
habits: Light weekly hydration with base recipes
Sleep with hair loose on a clean pillowcase

3.desc: Keep evolving and enjoying your transformed hair.
habits: Apply pure honey to ends for 15 min before washing
Use warm or cold water to wash your hair
Stay well hydrated — drink 2L of water

hairProgress.title: Your Progress
hairProgress.subtitle: Continuous hair journey — track each phase
hairProgress.motivational: Keep marking weeks in the plan to advance through phases.
